content: Original 2005 Deed: Names Arjun Mehta and Rohan Mehta as co-owners. Signed by both brothers and registered with Sub-Registrar, Pune. 2018 Deed: Presented by Vikram Desai to register transfer. Names Arjun Mehta as sole owner. Signed by Arjun Mehta. Thumbprint on signature: Digitally altered. Comparison with 2005 deed shows mismatched ridge patterns. Forensic analysis confirms 2018 deed was printed on paper manufactured after 2017, but the ink and signature were scanned from a 2005 document and digitally superimposed. The 2005 deed was found hidden in Arjun’s safe behind a false panel. Vikram’s legal team submitted the forged 2018 deed to register land transfer on October 14, 2023 — approved by Sub-Registrar on October 16, 2023, before fraud was detected.
